name: Xiuhong Li
title: PhD · Deep Learning System & GPU Architecture
bio: I am a researcher focused on high-performance computing and compiler design. My work investigates new algorithms, abstractions, and frameworks for efficient training and inference on CPU and GPU.

researchInterests.title: High-performance Inference System
